_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial working memory in neurofibromatosis 1: Altered neural activity and functional connectivity.

_contextSnippet: we found significant hypoactivation of key components of working memory circuitry, the right IPS and left DLPFC in patients with NF1 relative to healthy controls during task performance
details: Task successfully differentiated NF1 patients from healthy controls, showing hypoactivation in right IPS and left DLPFC in NF1 patients during task performance
